text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 209 

PROFNL_SRVC_FEE_PD_AMT 

LABEL: Professional Service Fee Paid Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The amount paid by Medicaid or the managed care plan on this claim or adjustment towards the costs 
of clinical services not otherwise covered under the professional dispensing fee. 

SHORT NAME: PROFNL_SRVC_FEE_PD_AMT 

LONG NAME: PROFNL_SRVC_FEE_PD_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS
